name: Remote DNS Scanner
notes: Reports a source IP address attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common DNS ports to more than 60 hosts in 10 minutes.
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times
conditions_text: when the event context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
when an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: DNS Ports
when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
thresholds: when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
TD_list: APPLY Remote DNS Scanner on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event context is Remote to Local, Remote to Remote
AND when an event matches any of the following BB:PortDefinition: DNS Ports
AND when any of these BB:CategoryDefinition: Recon Events, BB:CategoryDefinition: Suspicious Events with the same source IP more than 5 times, across more than 59 destination IP within 10 minutes
RED_list: Event description: Detected a source IP address attempting reconnaissance or suspicious connections on common DNS ports to more than 60 hosts in 10 minutes.
